prompt: The GUI is not created on the Event Dispatch Thread. What is the bug?
choices: JFrame must be created inside a try-with-resources block
Swing components must be created and modified on the EDT; creating them on the main thread violates the single-thread rule
setVisible() can only be called from a static context
JFrame requires SwingManager.install() to be called first
explanation: Swing requires all component creation and modification to happen on the EDT. Creating a JFrame on the main thread (before the EDT is set up) is technically unsafe. Fix: wrap in SwingUtilities.invokeLater(() -> { JFrame f = new JFrame(); ... f.setVisible(true); });
